generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorDS18S201 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S202 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S203 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S201, TemperatureSensorDS18S202, TemperatureSensorDS18S203
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, ModelA, ModelB
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for thermal incubator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB to manage 4A current requirements"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for thermal incubator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB to manage 4A current requirements"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container, heatbed, fan, three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorDS18S201, TemperatureSensorDS18S202, TemperatureSensorDS18S203, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBAssembly, PowerSupply
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for GPIO management and hardware interface"
]

instance PCBAssembly : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for managing 4A current requirements"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model predicting temperature using energy flow equations with two free parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model predicting temperature using energy flow equations with four free parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares optimization for model parameter calibration using Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message brokering platform using RabbitMQ for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, CalibrationService, FaultDetectionService, SupervisoryControlService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance OpenSourceRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for storing system source code and documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for hardware control and GPIO management"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system for safety violations and suboptimal performance based on DT predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, SuboptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for adjusting process temperature based on DT predictions and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustProcessTemperature_Automatic
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to determine current system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services to ensure safe and optimal operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalOperationInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Process of developing and validating simulation models with calibration and experimental data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety violations in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of suboptimal performance in thermal incubator system"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current system state estimation from sensor data"
]

instance OptimalOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal operation parameters for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model calibration results from non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation models through experimental data comparison"
]

instance AdjustProcessTemperature_Automatic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of process temperature based on DT predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustProcessTemperature_Manual : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of process temperature by human operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) from DT via RabbitMQ are processed by the controller and executed by the low-level driver through MOSFETs to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), controller, low-level driver, and simulation models with data flowing via RabbitMQ between PT sensors and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' phase, integrating models post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control of the physical incubator."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing predictions with experimental temperature data, testing assumptions (e.g., uniformity via three sensors), and minimizing residual error during calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for communication between PT sensors/actuators and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, co-located with the PT controller."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller uses upper and lower temperature limits to prevent overheating."
]
